name: SIC-POVM

phase_0.boundary_condition: The Zauner Conjecture boundary (completeness of the orbit in Hilbert space)

VINIT.justification: The uninitialized state before the dimension d or the base field K_d is specified.

TANCH.justification: The terminal state where d^2 equiangular projectors are confirmed to exist.

AFWD.justification: The forward transformation from algebraic coordinates to complex vectors in Hilbert space.

AREV.justification: The reverse transformation from geometric equiangularity to arithmetic invariants in the ray class field.

CLINK.justification: Sequential application of displacement operators to generate the full set of vectors from a fiducial.

IMSCRIB.justification: Self-recognition of the fiducial vector under the order-3 unitary Z; the state is itself under Z.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits a Stark unit into its logarithmic absolute values across Archimedean places (T-arm) and its phase/Artin symbol (F-arm).

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the unique Stark unit from its regulator data and its Galois parity.

EVALT.justification: The inner product Tr(Pi_j Pi_k) equals exactly 1/(d+1).

EVALF.justification: The overlap fails the 1/(d+1) constraint, indicating a sub-Frobenius state.

ENGAGR.justification: The paraconsistent 'Both' state where truth and falsehood are held simultaneously in the bilattice.

IFIX.justification: The permanent, irreversible record of a machine-verified proof step.

phase_3.void_description: Unspecified dimension d; no field defined.
phase_3.true_description: Exact SIC-POVM existence for dimension d.
phase_3.false_description: Structural barrier (e.g., WH(2)^2 in d=4 fails the lift).
phase_3.both_description: The Belnap multilattice state where equiangularity is true in the lattice but metric-unresolved in Hilbert space.

steps.domain_action: Initialize dimension d and base field K_d = Q(sqrt(d(d-2)))
Construct the ray class field L_d with conductor m_d
Apply Dirichlet map to the unit group of L_d
Verify Zauner symmetry Z|phi> = |phi> on the candidate unit
Reconstitute the Stark generator ε_d from the eigenspace
Apply the Weyl-Heisenberg displacement operators to ε_d
Map the Galois orbit to the Weyl orbit via the Artin symbol (H3)
Hold the bilattice fiducial B in the knowledge order
Branch into metric verification (T) and structural verification (F)
Confirm constant overlap 1/(d+1) across the orbit (C4)
Detect metric deviation in even-parity dimensions (n=2, d=4)
Reconcile structural skeleton with Hilbert space lift
Commit the proof to the Lean 4 formal kernel
Terminal anchor: SIC-POVM existence certified for dimension d

phase_6.cycle_cost: Computational complexity of the regulator matrix determinant
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The proof is a structural identity; information is conserved through the Frobenius cycle.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → IMSCRIB → FFUSE → CLINK → AREV → ENGAGR → FSPLIT → EVALT → EVALF → FFUSE → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: SIC-POVM
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,4,4,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=3
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=15
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(2, 5), (9, 12)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑾  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑼 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [2] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [3] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [4] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑚 → 𐑙  | identity — self-imscription
--   [5] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑱  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [6] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑙 → 𐑗  | composition — regime coherence
--   [7] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑱 → 𐑳  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [8] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑗 → 𐑚  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [9] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [10] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [11] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [12] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑭  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [13] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑙 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [14] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def sic_povm_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize dimension d and base field K_d = Q(sqrt(d(d-2))))
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Construct the ray class field L_d with conductor m_d)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (Apply Dirichlet map to the unit group of L_d) / FFUSE [5] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Identify the (-1)-eigenspace of complex conjugation (H2a))
        (.arrow 𐑠 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Verify Zauner symmetry Z|phi> = |phi> on the candidate unit)
      -- F-branch (0 nodes)
      (.refl 𐑙))  -- F-branch: empty arc (direct to FFUSE.F)
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [5]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [5] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reconstitute the Stark generator ε_d from the eigenspace)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑙 𐑗)  -- [6] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Apply the Weyl-Heisenberg displacement operators to ε_d)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑱 𐑳)  -- [7] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Map the Galois orbit to the Weyl orbit via the Artin symbol (H3))
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑗 𐑚)  -- [8] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Hold the bilattice fiducial B in the knowledge order)
  -- FSPLIT [9] (gran := 𐑚) (Branch into metric verification (T) and structural verification (F)) / FFUSE [12] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [10] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Confirm constant overlap 1/(d+1) across the orbit (C4))
      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [11] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Detect metric deviation in even-parity dimensions (n=2, d=4)))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [12]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [12] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reconcile structural skeleton with Hilbert space lift)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [13] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Commit the proof to the Lean 4 formal kernel)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [14] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Terminal anchor: SIC-POVM existence certified for dimension d)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def sic_povm_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (sic_povm_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def sic_povm_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (sic_povm_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem sic_povm_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

end Imscribing
